name: OPC UA Expert
description: Expert assistant for OPC UA (IEC 62541) specifications, NodeSets, companion specifications, and compliance. Search 180K+ indexed documents, validate NodeSet XMLs, compare versions, and get modelling guidance per OPC 11030 best practices.
